phase_prompts.intake: Use agents/brief-interviewer.md, agents/book-dna-locker.md, and agents/layout-profile-planner.md. Ask/structure the pre-writing brief and layout package before any story proposal or manuscript writing.
phase_prompts.propose: Use agents/proposal-generator.md and write _workspace/01_proposals.md plus a *_proposal.md file.
phase_prompts.design-big: Use concept/character/plot/book structure agents. Write novel-config.md, design/01_concept_bootstrap.md, design/02_character_core.md, design/03_macro_plot_hooks.md, design/04_book_plan.md, design/05_chapter_plan.md, design/06_layout_plan.md, and matching revision/_state plan JSON files.
phase_prompts.design-small: After book-plan-approval.json is approved, write design/EP001-EP00N_scene_plan.md, character detail, and plot detail files for the selected chapter range.
phase_prompts.create: Write episode/epNNN.md files and required quality/TDK/layout artifacts under revision/_workspace/.
phase_prompts.polish: Run editorial agents, TDK/layout checks, and write revision reviewer plus editor reports.
phase_prompts.rewrite: Rewrite only when required, preserve state ledgers, and write rewrite plus quality-verifier artifacts.
phase_prompts.export: Build front matter, cover brief, publication-compliance artifacts, export manifest, and DOCX.

notes: Use this profile when a human-operated IDE agent such as Cursor, Windsurf, Continue, Claude Code, or Codex writes files directly.
In IDE manual mode, the IDE agent or human operator writes creative content; kit_hub validates, tracks, and exports it.
Do not claim autonomous app authorship unless a provider/API/CLI command actually executed the phase.
Do not claim internet research occurred unless source artifacts were produced.
The runner waits after each phase, then validates the artifacts produced by the IDE agent.
No external API key is required by this repository in manual IDE mode.
Because the IDE agent is external to this runner, execution_claim_mode remains simulated, but artifact gates still run.
intake must present book-brief, book-dna, and layout-profile; propose is blocked until the user approves book-brief-approval.json.
design-big must present book, chapter, and layout plans; design-small is blocked until the user approves book-plan-approval.json.
Agent compliance manifests must include concrete output_artifacts plus matching artifact_hashes.
Agent compliance manifests must include contract_hashes for the current agent registry, status contract, and phase contract.
Agent orchestration is governed by runtime/agent-registry.json, runtime/agent-status-contract.json, and runtime/phase-contracts/*.json.
Agent compliance manifests must include agent_statuses; required agents must be completed.
Configured phase commands pass a fail-closed safety gate before execution.
Large text/JSON/Markdown artifacts are rejected unless split into bounded evidence.
Export always runs the deterministic local Turkish rule gate and must not claim official TDK verification.
External grammar providers are not part of the default engine because they produced unreliable Turkish suggestions in live tests.
The runner writes runtime/runs/{run_id}/run-journal.jsonl for phase audit events.
Exported DOCX text must match the current episode source files.
For machine-verifiable executed evidence, use runtime/runner-config.json command mode instead.
